summary: Completed testing of Dealer Portal Phase 2 & 3 features. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend pages load correctly without errors.

issues: All products show 'Out of Stock' - this may be expected if no stock data exists, but worth verifying stock visibility is working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All dealer portal Phase 2 & 3 APIs are properly implemented with correct role-based access control
Dealer Catalogue API correctly allows both dealer and admin roles
Dealer-only endpoints (announcements, targets, warranty, reorder) correctly restrict access to dealer role only
Warranty registration properly validates duplicate serial numbers
Reorder suggestions algorithm correctly analyzes purchase history patterns
seed_data_creation: Reset dealer password for testdealer@example.com to Dealer@123 for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dealer Portal Phase 2 & 3 features fully tested. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_dealer_portal_phase2_3.py covers: 1) Dealer Catalogue with live stock visibility, 2) Admin Announcements CRUD, 3) Dealer Announcements with read status, 4) Dealer Targets with monthly/quarterly/yearly breakdown and incentives, 5) Warranty Registration with duplicate serial validation, 6) Smart Reorder Suggestions based on purchase history. All frontend routes (/dealer/catalogue, /dealer/announcements, /dealer/targets, /dealer/warranty, /dealer/reorder-suggestions) load correctly.
